## What changed

<!-- One line. -->

## Why

<!-- What prompted this? Client instruction, audit finding, new asset? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Correction — fixing something that was wrong (PATCH)
- [ ] Addition — new rule, asset, or documentation (MINOR)
- [ ] Brand change — alters how the brand looks or sounds (MAJOR)

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] If tokens changed, `brand.json` and the prose in `foundations/` agree
- [ ] If a colour pairing changed, contrast re-checked against AA
- [ ] If an asset was added, its licence is recorded in `legal/licences.md`
- [ ] Client has approved this change (required for brand changes)
